title: Trip Turbo Launches Travel Mela 2025 in Nepal with Discounts and Prizes
summary: HIGHLIGHTS Trip Turbo brings one of Nepal’s biggest travel festivals. Here you can win Bangkok… HIGHLIGHTS Deerwalk Learning Center launched its free mobile app on 12 August 2025. The app… HIGHLIGHTS Tootle by Zapp launched “Tootle Pro” — Nepal’s first ride-hailing subscription service. With this… HIGHLIGHTS Online travel marketplace Trip Turbo officially launches; offers 150+ thrilling activities

The app… HIGHLIGHTS Tootle by Zapp launched “Tootle Pro” — Nepal’s first ride-hailing subscription service. With this… HIGHLIGHTS Online travel marketplace Trip Turbo officially launches; offers 150+ thrilling activities. To celebrate the… HIGHLIGHTS Ride-sharing app Tootle started a parcel delivery service in Kathmandu.
